upper.title: All Conditionals: Mixed Conditionals, Alternatives to If, Inversion
upper.content:
📌 Tổng quan các loại conditional
Zero conditional (Loại 0): Sự thật chung / quy luật tự nhiên
→ If + present simple, present simple
• If you heat ice, it melts.

First conditional (Loại 1): Tình huống có thể xảy ra trong tương lai
→ If + present simple, will + infinitive
• If it rains, we will cancel the trip.

Second conditional (Loại 2): Tình huống giả định ở hiện tại / tương lai
→ If + past simple, would/could/might + infinitive
• If I were rich, I would travel the world.

Third conditional (Loại 3): Tình huống giả định trong quá khứ
→ If + past perfect, would/could/might + have + past participle
• If she had studied harder, she would have passed.
📌 Mixed Conditionals (Câu điều kiện hỗn hợp)
Mixed conditionals là sự kết hợp giữa loại 2 và loại 3, dùng để kết nối quá khứ và hiện tại trong cùng một câu.

Loại 3 (if-clause) + Loại 2 (main clause) — Điều kiện trong quá khứ, kết quả ở hiện tại:
→ If + past perfect, would/could/might + infinitive
• If I had won the lottery, I would be rich now.
• If she hadn't dropped out of school, she could have a better job now.
• If I had been elected, I would be the president now.

Loại 2 (if-clause) + Loại 3 (main clause) — Điều kiện ở hiện tại, kết quả trong quá khứ:
→ If + past simple, would/could/might + have + past participle
• If I were a man, they would have given me the job.
• If I didn't have so much work, I would have gone to the party.
• I would have understood them if I spoke German.

⚠️ Lưu ý: Điều kiện ở hiện tại (loại 2) cũng tồn tại ở quá khứ — vì vậy nó ảnh hưởng đến kết quả quá khứ.
📌 Alternatives to If (Thay thế cho If)
As long as / Provided (that) / Providing (that) / On condition (that) / Only if
→ Nhấn mạnh điều kiện bắt buộc phải có:
• I'll tell you as long as you keep the secret.
• I'll lend you money provided (that) you pay me back.
• They'll speak to the press on condition (that) they remain anonymous.
• We'll invest only if you prove it's safe.

Whether or not — Cả hai tình huống đều xảy ra:
• I'll help him whether or not he needs me. (dù cần hay không)

Even if — Nhấn mạnh: dù có... cũng...
• Even if you apologise, he'll never forgive you.

Suppose / Supposing — Hãy tưởng tượng rằng...
• Supposing I got a job, I wouldn't be able to travel.
• Suppose she doesn't believe you — what would you do?
📌 Inversion in Conditional Sentences (Đảo ngữ trong câu điều kiện)
Should you find (Loại 1 — trang trọng, thay cho If you find):
• Should you find the answer, please let me know.
• Should you change your mind, you know where to contact us.

Had we arrived (Loại 3 — thay cho If we had arrived):
• Had we arrived earlier, we could have prevented the incident.
• Had they looked further into the data, they might have realised the mistake.

Were we to announce (Loại 2 — tương lai giả định, thay cho If we announced):
• Were we to announce the truth, we would receive a lot of criticism.
• Were they to buy a new house, they would need to sell the old one.

⚠️ Dạng phủ định: KHÔNG dùng dạng rút gọn — dùng not sau chủ ngữ:
• ❌ Shouldn't you wish... → ✅ Should you not wish to retake the test, let us know.
• ❌ Hadn't you refused... → ✅ Had you not refused my invitation, we would have had a wonderful time.
• ❌ Weren't you my brother... → ✅ Were you not my brother, I would call the police.
If I had taken that job in Paris, I would be living there now — but I chose to stay, and I don't regret it.Mixed conditional: quá khứ → kết quả hiện tại
Should you require any further assistance, please do not hesitate to contact our customer service team.Inversion: Should = If you require (trang trọng)

exercises.q: If she ___ harder at school, she would have a degree now.
exercises.exp: Mixed conditional (3rd→2nd): past perfect trong if-clause, kết quả ở hiện tại

exercises.q: ___ you need any help with the application, feel free to contact us.
exercises.exp: Inversion loại 1: Should = If you need (trang trọng, formal)

exercises.q: If I didn't have a fear of heights, I ___ that bungee jump last summer.
exercises.exp: Mixed conditional (2nd→3rd): điều kiện hiện tại, kết quả quá khứ

exercises.q: ___ they offered a better salary, I might have accepted the position.
exercises.exp: Inversion loại 3: Had they offered = If they had offered

exercises.q: I'll sign the contract ___ you guarantee delivery within two weeks.
exercises.exp: Provided that = on condition that (nhấn mạnh điều kiện bắt buộc)

exercises.q: If he ___ more confident, he would have got the promotion last year.
exercises.exp: Mixed conditional (2nd→3rd): điều kiện tính cách hiện tại ảnh hưởng đến kết quả quá khứ

exercises.q: ___ you to find any errors in the report, please email me immediately.
exercises.exp: Inversion loại 2 với were + to + infinitive (tương lai giả định)

exercises.q: She would have been promoted years ago if she ___ better people skills.
exercises.exp: Mixed conditional (2nd→3rd): điều kiện thực tế hiện tại, kết quả quá khứ

exercises.q: ___ she finds out about the surprise, everything will be ruined.
exercises.exp: If (loại 1): điều kiện có khả năng xảy ra trong tương lai

exercises.q: I will attend the ceremony ___ the weather is bad. I promised.
exercises.exp: Even if = dù điều kiện không thuận lợi vẫn xảy ra

exercises.q: ___ you have any objections, you should raise them before the vote.
exercises.exp: Inversion: Should you have = If you have (loại 1 formal)

exercises.q: If I ___ the truth back then, I might be in a very different situation now.
exercises.exp: Mixed conditional (3rd→2nd): past perfect → kết quả ở thì hiện tại

exercises.q: I'll reveal the information ___ you agree to protect your source.
exercises.opts: on condition that,even if,whether or not,unless
exercises.exp: On condition that = nhấn mạnh điều kiện cụ thể cần thỏa mãn

exercises.q: ___ they have won the championship, things would be very different now.
exercises.exp: Inversion: Had they won = If they had won (loại 3)

exercises.q: ___ he speaking more slowly, I would have understood the lecture better.
exercises.exp: Were he speaking = If he were speaking (đảo ngữ loại 2 với continuous)

exercises.q: She would pass ___ she tries harder in the final weeks of term.
exercises.exp: If = loại 1: điều kiện thực có thể xảy ra

exercises.q: ___ I had chosen a different career, I might be much happier now.
exercises.exp: If + past perfect → mixed conditional kết quả hiện tại

exercises.q: You're free to leave early ___ you finish the task before going.
exercises.opts: as long as,even if,unless,whether or not
exercises.exp: As long as = provided that (điều kiện để điều gì đó được phép)

exercises.q: ___ the project to fail, the entire department would face serious cuts.
exercises.exp: Were + subject + to + infinitive: giả định tương lai trang trọng

exercises.q: She would have reacted differently ___ she hadn't been so exhausted at the time.
exercises.exp: If + past perfect: third conditional — điều kiện và kết quả đều trong quá khứ

exercises.q: ___ (had/she/study) more consistently, she might have a scholarship now.
exercises.exp: Inversion loại 3: Had she studied = If she had studied

exercises.q: I'll help you ___ (provide) you take full responsibility for the outcome.
exercises.exp: Provided (that) = on condition that — nhấn mạnh điều kiện

exercises.q: If he ___ (be) more organised, he wouldn't have missed all those deadlines last month.
exercises.exp: Mixed conditional (2nd→3rd): were = điều kiện hiện tại ảnh hưởng đến quá khứ

exercises.q: ___ (were/we/to/announce) the merger now, shareholders would panic.
exercises.exp: Were + subject + to-infinitive: inversion loại 2 giả định tương lai

exercises.q: If he ___ (be) more careful throughout his career, he might still be playing now.
exercises.exp: Mixed conditional (3rd→2nd): past perfect → would/might + infinitive (kết quả hiện tại)

exercises.q: ___ (were/she/to/resign) now, the board would face a serious leadership crisis.
exercises.exp: Inversion loại 2 với were + to + infinitive: giả định tương lai trang trọng

exercises.q: I'll give you full access to the files ___ (on condition that) everything stays confidential.
exercises.exp: On condition that = với điều kiện (trang trọng, nhấn mạnh điều kiện cụ thể)

exercises.q: If they ___ (invest) in better technology years ago, the company would be leading the market now.
exercises.exp: Mixed conditional: past perfect → would + infinitive (kết quả ở hiện tại)

exercises.q: ___ (had/I/known) how difficult it would be, I might have made a different choice.
exercises.exp: Inversion loại 3: Had I known = If I had known (formal)

exercises.q: You can attend the conference ___ (whether or not) you are formally registered.
exercises.exp: Whether or not = regardless of whether (cả hai tình huống đều cho phép tham dự)

exercises.q: ___ (supposing) the plan fails — do we have an alternative strategy in place?
exercises.exp: Supposing/Suppose = đặt ra giả thiết, thường để hỏi về kế hoạch dự phòng

exercises.q: If she ___ (not/grow up) in poverty, she would never have developed such resilience.
exercises.exp: Mixed conditional (3rd→2nd): quá khứ → kết quả hiện tại (resilience)

exercises.q: The terms will be honoured ___ (as long as) both parties fulfil their obligations.
exercises.exp: As long as = miễn là / với điều kiện (cả hai bên thực hiện đúng nghĩa vụ)

exercises.q: ___ (were/they/not/to/comply) with the regulations, serious penalties would apply.
exercises.exp: Inversion loại 2 phủ định: Were they not to = If they did not (formal)

exercises.q: ___ (even if) you paid me a fortune, I wouldn't work for that company.
exercises.exp: Even if = nhấn mạnh rằng dù điều kiện xảy ra cũng không thay đổi kết quả

exercises.q: ___ (should/you/not/wish) to continue, please inform us by Friday.
exercises.exp: Inversion phủ định: Should you not = If you don't (formal)

exercises.q: If I ___ (not/be) so shy as a child, I would have made more friends at school.
exercises.exp: Mixed conditional (3rd→2nd): past perfect + điều kiện ảnh hưởng đến hiện tại

exercises.q: She'll accept the offer ___ (only if) the terms are completely transparent.
exercises.exp: Only if = nhấn mạnh điều kiện duy nhất cần thiết

exercises.q: ___ (suppose) you could live anywhere in the world — where would you choose?
exercises.exp: Suppose/Supposing = hãy tưởng tượng rằng / what if

exercises.q: If he ___ (take) that business deal, he would be a millionaire by now.
exercises.exp: Mixed conditional: past perfect → would be (kết quả hiện tại)

writing_prompts.vi: Hãy viết về một quyết định quan trọng trong quá khứ và hậu quả của nó đối với cuộc sống hiện tại của bạn. Dùng mixed conditionals và inversion để thể hiện mối liên hệ giữa quá khứ và hiện tại.
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Mixed conditionals (3rd→2nd), inversion (Had I..., Were I...), provided that, even if
writing_prompts.example: Looking back, I often wonder how different my life would be had I accepted that scholarship in Canada ten years ago. Had I taken that opportunity, I would probably be working in a completely different field now — perhaps in research rather than teaching. If I were the kind of person who took more risks, I would have said yes without hesitation. But I was young and afraid of change, and so I stayed. Even if someone had explained all the advantages to me, I am not sure I would have chosen differently at that age. As long as I remain open to new opportunities in the future, I believe I can still build the career I want. Were I to make that same decision today, I would not hesitate for a single moment. The experience taught me that provided you reflect honestly on your choices, you can always learn something valuable from the path not taken.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết về một tình huống giả định trong tương lai — điều gì sẽ xảy ra nếu một thay đổi lớn xảy ra với công ty, đất nước, hoặc xã hội? Dùng inversion và các lựa chọn thay thế cho if.
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Were + subject + to + infinitive, Should + inversion, as long as, on condition that, whether or not, even if
writing_prompts.example: Were the government to introduce a four-day working week, the effects on both productivity and mental health would be significant. Should this policy be implemented without proper preparation, however, many businesses would struggle to adapt. As long as companies were given sufficient time to restructure their operations, the transition could be managed effectively. The reform would only succeed on condition that both employers and employees agreed to maintain output levels. Whether or not people supported the idea initially, most would likely appreciate the benefits once they experienced them. Even if a small number of sectors faced temporary difficulties, the overall improvement in quality of life would justify the change. Were all European countries to adopt similar policies simultaneously, the competitive disadvantage for any single nation would be minimised. Should any major problems arise during the first year, the policy could always be adjusted based on evidence.

writing_prompts.vi: Bạn đang tư vấn cho một người bạn đang phải đưa ra một quyết định khó khăn. Hãy viết lời khuyên chi tiết, sử dụng các cấu trúc điều kiện đa dạng bao gồm alternatives to if.
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: First and second conditionals, as long as, provided that, even if, whether or not, only if, suppose/supposing
hint_words: I would only do it if
writing_prompts.example: Supposing you decided to leave your current job — have you thought carefully about what comes next? I would only make such a major move if I had another position confirmed, or at least a solid financial cushion to rely on. As long as you have savings to cover at least six months of expenses, the risk becomes much more manageable. Should you decide to resign without another job lined up, the psychological pressure can be enormous. I think you should go for it, whether or not your current manager tries to persuade you to stay — your wellbeing comes first. Even if the new role seems less prestigious on paper, job satisfaction matters far more in the long run. On condition that you negotiate your starting salary carefully, you could easily match your current income within a year. Provided that you remain flexible and open to learning, the change will almost certainly be worthwhile.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết đoạn văn mô tả một tình huống lịch sử — điều gì có thể đã xảy ra nếu một sự kiện quan trọng diễn ra theo cách khác? Dùng inversion và mixed conditionals.
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Had + inversion (3rd conditional), mixed conditionals, were + to + infinitive, even if, as long as
hint_words: had the war not broken out
writing_prompts.example: Had the peace negotiations in 1938 succeeded, the course of the twentieth century would look radically different from what we know today. Millions of lives would have been saved, and entire cities that were destroyed might still be standing. Had the major powers reached a genuine agreement at that critical moment, the economic and cultural development of Europe would have accelerated by decades. Were historians to examine the evidence more carefully, they might find that the failure was not inevitable — it was the result of specific, avoidable decisions made by individuals under pressure. Even if the political tensions had not been fully resolved, a temporary ceasefire might have changed the trajectory entirely. Had the technology of the time allowed for faster communication between leaders, misunderstandings could have been avoided. As long as we study these events critically, we can learn lessons that remain deeply relevant to the conflicts of our own era.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết một bức thư trang trọng (formal letter) đặt ra các điều kiện cho một thỏa thuận kinh doanh hay hợp tác. Dùng inversion trang trọng và các biểu thức thay thế for if.
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Should + inversion (formal), provided that, on condition that, only if, were + to + infinitive, as long as
writing_prompts.example: Dear Mr. Harrison, I am writing to outline the conditions under which our organisation would be prepared to enter into a formal partnership agreement with your firm. Should you agree to the terms set out below, we believe this collaboration could be enormously beneficial to both parties. We would be willing to proceed, provided that all intellectual property developed during the partnership remains jointly owned. On condition that your team meets the agreed milestones within the specified timeframes, we will release the first phase of funding without delay. Should any dispute arise during the course of the project, both parties agree to seek mediation before pursuing any legal action. Were either party to withdraw from the agreement without reasonable cause, a financial penalty would apply as outlined in Clause 7. As long as the lines of communication remain open and transparent, we are confident that this partnership will succeed. Should you wish to discuss any of these terms further, please do not hesitate to contact me directly. Yours sincerely, Dr. Elena Marsh

upper.title: Mixed Conditionals: If I Were You, I Wouldn't Have Done It
upper.content:
📌 Mixed Conditionals là gì?
Mixed conditionals (câu điều kiện hỗn hợp) kết hợp hai loại conditional khác nhau trong cùng một câu — thường là loại 2 và loại 3. Điều này xảy ra khi điều kiện và kết quả thuộc hai thời điểm khác nhau (một ở quá khứ, một ở hiện tại).

⚠️ Nhắc lại nhanh:
• Second conditional: If + past simple → would/could/might + infinitive (giả định hiện tại/tương lai)
• Third conditional: If + past perfect → would/could/might + have + past participle (giả định quá khứ)
📌 Loại 1: If-clause loại 3 + Main clause loại 2
Dùng khi: điều kiện xảy ra trong quá khứ → kết quả ở hiện tại
→ If + past perfect, would/could/might + infinitive

• If I had been elected, I would be the president now.
• If I had won the lottery, I would be rich.
• If she hadn't dropped out of school, she might have a better job now.
• If he had taken better care of himself, he would still be alive today.

💡 Nhận biết: now / today / still / at the moment → gợi ý kết quả ở hiện tại
📌 Loại 2: If-clause loại 2 + Main clause loại 3
Dùng khi: điều kiện ở hiện tại (cũng đúng ở quá khứ) → kết quả trong quá khứ
→ If + past simple, would/could/might + have + past participle

• If I were a man, they would have given me the job.
• If I didn't have so much work, I would have gone to the party last night.
• I would have understood them if I spoke German.
• If she weren't so shy, she would have spoken up at the meeting.

🔍 Lưu ý quan trọng: điều kiện ở hiện tại (loại 2) cũng tồn tại ở quá khứ — vì vậy nó ảnh hưởng đến kết quả quá khứ.
If I were a man (bây giờ) → có nghĩa là tôi cũng đã là đàn ông lúc phỏng vấn → nên tôi đã được nhận việc.
📌 Bảng tóm tắt Mixed Conditionals
LoạiIf-clauseMain clauseÝ nghĩa
3rd→2ndPast perfectwould + infQuá khứ → kết quả hiện tại
2nd→3rdPast simplewould have + ppHiện tại → kết quả quá khứ
If I had taken that job in London, I would be earning far more money now — but I chose family over career.Mixed conditional (3rd→2nd): điều kiện quá khứ → kết quả hiện tại
If I weren't so afraid of public speaking, I would have accepted that keynote invitation last month.Mixed conditional (2nd→3rd): điều kiện hiện tại (nỗi sợ vẫn tồn tại) → kết quả quá khứ

exercises.q: If she ___ the scholarship, she would be studying at Oxford now.
exercises.exp: Mixed conditional (3rd→2nd): past perfect → would + infinitive. Điều kiện quá khứ, kết quả ở hiện tại (now)

exercises.q: If I ___ afraid of flying, we would have gone to Japan for our holiday.
exercises.exp: Mixed conditional (2nd→3rd): past simple trong if-clause, would have + pp trong main clause. Điều kiện hiện tại → kết quả quá khứ

exercises.q: He ___ the company now if he hadn't made that terrible investment decision.

writing_prompts.vi: Hãy viết về một khoảnh khắc quan trọng trong quá khứ mà bạn đưa ra một lựa chọn khác — và kết quả đó ảnh hưởng đến cuộc sống hiện tại của bạn như thế nào. Dùng mixed conditionals để kết nối quá khứ và hiện tại.
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Mixed conditionals (3rd→2nd): If + past perfect, would/could/might + infinitive (now/today/still)
writing_prompts.example: There is one decision that I think about more than any other — the moment I chose to leave my hometown at twenty-two and move abroad for a job I wasn't even sure I wanted. If I had stayed, I would probably be working in the same company where I started my career, which was comfortable but not particularly fulfilling. I might still be living with my parents, saving slowly and watching the years pass in a kind of comfortable routine. If I hadn't taken that leap, I wouldn't be the person I am today — someone who has learned to adapt, to be resilient, and to find opportunity in uncertainty. If I had known how difficult the first year abroad would be, I might not have had the courage to go. But I'm glad I didn't know. I would be far less confident now if I hadn't faced those early challenges alone. The experience shaped me entirely, and I wouldn't trade it for anything.

writing_prompts.vi: Hãy viết về một đặc điểm tính cách hoặc thói quen mà bạn có (hoặc không có) và cách nó đã ảnh hưởng đến các sự kiện trong quá khứ. Dùng mixed conditionals loại 2→3.
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Mixed conditionals (2nd→3rd): If + past simple (present trait), would/could/might + have + past participle
writing_prompts.example: One of my greatest weaknesses has always been my tendency to overthink everything. If I weren't so prone to analysis paralysis, I would have applied for that senior role at my company three years ago — I was clearly qualified, but I spent months convincing myself I wasn't ready. If I were better at trusting my instincts, I might have spoken up in that crucial strategy meeting and changed the direction of the whole project. If I didn't feel so anxious about making mistakes in public, I would have volunteered to present at the industry conference last year. I am slowly working on these tendencies, and I can already see the difference. But if I were more decisive by nature, I could have avoided so many missed opportunities in my career. The encouraging thing is that personality is not fixed — and I am proof that with effort, it can genuinely change.

writing_prompts.vi: Hãy viết về một nhân vật lịch sử, một sự kiện lịch sử, hoặc một tình huống 'nếu như...' nổi tiếng, và suy ngẫm xem thế giới sẽ khác đi như thế nào. Dùng cả hai loại mixed conditionals.
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Mixed conditionals: both 3rd→2nd and 2nd→3rd, with could/might for uncertainty
writing_prompts.example: Few events in the twentieth century reshaped the world as dramatically as the two world wars, and it is fascinating to consider how different things might be had certain decisions been made differently. If Archduke Franz Ferdinand had not been assassinated in 1914, the chain of events leading to the First World War might never have been set in motion, and the political map of Europe would look entirely different today. If Germany had not been subjected to the harsh terms of the Treaty of Versailles, the conditions that allowed extreme nationalism to flourish might never have developed — and the Second World War might have been avoided entirely. If the world were shaped by those alternate histories, we could be living in a very different geopolitical reality now. Of course, history rarely follows simple logic, and if things had unfolded differently in one place, they would surely have diverged in unexpected ways elsewhere. Still, exploring these questions reminds us that the present is always the product of countless choices — and that the future remains genuinely open.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết về một mối quan hệ — bạn bè, tình cảm, hay đồng nghiệp — và những khoảnh khắc then chốt có thể đã thay đổi kết quả. Dùng mixed conditionals để thể hiện sự kết nối giữa quá khứ và hiện tại.
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Mixed conditionals (both types), might/could for uncertainty, negative forms
writing_prompts.example: My closest friendship nearly ended three years ago over a misunderstanding that, looking back, was entirely avoidable. If I hadn't ignored her messages for two weeks while I was dealing with my own problems, she wouldn't have felt abandoned at a moment when she needed support most. The silence created a distance that took months to close. If I were better at expressing when I am struggling, I would have explained what I was going through instead of disappearing. She is still one of my closest friends today, but if she hadn't been so forgiving by nature, the friendship might not have survived. If she hadn't reached out first, I might never have found the courage to apologise. I am deeply grateful that she did. The experience changed how I approach all my close relationships now — I remind myself that if I had learned this lesson earlier, I could have avoided so much unnecessary hurt on both sides.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết một đoạn văn từ góc nhìn của một nhân vật hư cấu — có thể là trong một cuốn sách, bộ phim, hay câu chuyện bạn tự tạo ra — đang nhìn lại cuộc đời của họ và những gì có thể đã khác đi.
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Mixed conditionals (3rd→2nd and 2nd→3rd), narrative past tense framing, could/might/would
writing_prompts.example: My name is Eleanor Voss, and I have spent forty years on the road as a travelling musician. If I had listened to my father and studied law, I would be sitting in a comfortable office somewhere right now, with a pension plan and two weeks of holiday a year. I would be perfectly safe and completely miserable. If I hadn't met a street guitarist in Barcelona at the age of twenty-two, I might never have discovered what I was truly capable of. He heard me humming to myself on a bench and handed me a guitar without a word. If I weren't the stubborn, restless kind of person I am, I would have handed it back and kept walking. Instead, I played for three hours and never really stopped. If I had chosen the safer path, I could have had stability — but I would have lost myself entirely. I don't regret a single night spent in a draughty van or a badly lit club. Every moment was mine.

upper.title: Wish, If Only, Would Rather, It's Time: Unreal Uses of Past Tenses
upper.content:
📌 I wish / If only
Wish + past simple → Ước muốn ở HIỆN TẠI / tương lai (điều không có thật hoặc khó xảy ra):
• I wish things were different. (Thực tế: things are not different)
• I wish I could be there tomorrow.
• If only I were a bit taller!

Wish + past perfect → Hối tiếc về QUAÁ KHỨ (điều đã xảy ra và muốn đổi lại):
• I wish I hadn't quit my job.
• If only we had known sooner — we could have helped.

Wish + would → Mong muốn ai đó THAY ĐỔI hành vi (thường là sự phàn nàn):
• I wish you would stop biting your nails.
• I wish it would stop raining.
⚠️ KHÔNG dùng I wish I would (không tự ước về bản thân với would).

If only mạnh hơn I wish (nhấn mạnh hơn về cảm xúc):
• If only you had followed my advice!
• If only you would make a bit more effort!
⚠️ Sau I wish / if only + I/he/she: có thể dùng were thay cho was.
📌 Would rather / Would sooner
Would rather / sooner + infinitive → Sở thích của bản thân:
• I'd rather have tea than coffee.
• I'd sooner stay home tonight.

Would rather + subject + past simple → Muốn người KHÁC làm gì (hiện tại / tương lai):
• I'd rather you came with me. (= I'd prefer it if you came)
• I'd rather you didn't smoke in here.

Would rather + subject + past perfect → Muốn người khác đã làm gì TRONG QUÁ KHỨ:
• I'd rather you hadn't told him about it.
• She'd rather I had called first.
📌 It's time / It's high time
It's time + to-infinitive → Đã đến lúc làm gì đó (không chỉ định ai):
• It's time to leave.

It's time + subject + past simple → Đã đến lúc (và việc đó đáng lẽ đã phải xảy ra rồi — ngụ ý trách cứ):
• It's time you took this more seriously.
• It's time she apologised for what she did.

It's high time = nhấn mạnh rằng đã quá muộn, cần làm ngay:
• It's high time we had a serious conversation about this.
📌 Suppose / Supposing / What if
Dùng để đặt ra tình huống giả định (thường ở đầu câu):
• Suppose you had the chance — would you do it again?
• Supposing she finds out — what will you say?
• What if we are wrong about this?
I wish I had listened to my parents — if only I had been less stubborn when I was young.Wish + past perfect: hối tiếc về quá khứ
It's high time you started saving money — you can't rely on luck forever.It's high time + past simple: nhấn mạnh sự cần thiết phải hành động ngay

exercises.q: I wish I ___ harder when I was at university. Now I regret it.
exercises.exp: Wish + past perfect: hối tiếc về quá khứ (đã không học chăm)

exercises.q: It's high time the government ___ this issue seriously.
exercises.exp: It's high time + past simple: vấn đề đã quá muộn, cần hành động ngay

exercises.q: I'd rather you ___ here while I'm trying to concentrate, if you don't mind.
exercises.exp: Would rather + subject + past simple: muốn người khác không làm gì ở hiện tại

exercises.q: If only she ___ me about the change in plans. I could have prepared.
exercises.exp: If only + past perfect: hối tiếc về điều không xảy ra trong quá khứ

exercises.q: I wish you ___ make so much noise — I'm trying to sleep!
exercises.exp: Wish + would: phàn nàn về thói quen hoặc hành vi của người khác

exercises.q: She'd rather we ___ the meeting until next Friday if possible.
exercises.exp: Would rather + subject + past simple: sở thích về tình huống hiện tại/tương lai

exercises.q: I wish I ___ a better memory. I keep forgetting people's names.
exercises.exp: Wish + past simple: ước muốn về khả năng hiện tại (không có thật)

exercises.q: It's time you ___ your own decisions instead of always asking others.
exercises.exp: It's time + past simple: ngụ ý trách cứ, đã đến lúc phải làm

exercises.q: If only we ___ earlier — the traffic wasn't bad in the morning.
exercises.exp: If only + past perfect: hối tiếc về quyết định trong quá khứ

exercises.q: I'd rather you ___ me before making that announcement to the whole team.
exercises.exp: Would rather + subject + past perfect: muốn điều khác đã xảy ra trong quá khứ

exercises.q: I wish the weather ___ better this summer — it's been terrible.
exercises.exp: Wish + were: ước muốn về thực tại không thể thay đổi (dùng were với wish)

exercises.q: ___ you had a second chance — would you do anything differently?
exercises.exp: Suppose/Supposing = hãy tưởng tượng rằng (đặt ra tình huống giả định)

exercises.q: It's high time this old building ___. It's a safety hazard.
exercises.opts: was demolished,demolishes,would be demolished,has been demolished
exercises.exp: It's high time + past simple (passive): nhấn mạnh sự cần thiết

exercises.q: I wish I ___ with you on that trip — it sounds absolutely incredible.
exercises.exp: Wish + past perfect: hối tiếc về điều không xảy ra trong quá khứ

exercises.q: She'd sooner ___ the project alone than work with someone unreliable.
exercises.exp: Would sooner + bare infinitive: sở thích mạnh của bản thân

exercises.q: If only he ___ so impulsively all the time — it causes so many problems.
exercises.exp: If only + wouldn't: phàn nàn về thói quen của người khác (tương tự wish + would)

exercises.q: I wish I ___ her feelings when I said that. It came out all wrong.
exercises.exp: Wish + past perfect: hối tiếc về điều đã nói/làm trong quá khứ

exercises.q: It's time ___ a real conversation about where this relationship is going.
exercises.exp: It's time + to-infinitive: không chỉ định chủ ngữ cụ thể

exercises.q: What if we ___ wrong about all of this? Have you considered that possibility?
exercises.exp: What if + present/past: đặt câu hỏi giả định (thường với present nếu lo ngại thực)

exercises.q: I'd rather you ___ that to me directly instead of going through my manager.
exercises.exp: Would rather + subject + past perfect: muốn điều khác đã xảy ra trong quá khứ

exercises.q: I wish I ___ (know) about this earlier — I could have done something to help.
exercises.exp: Wish + past perfect: hối tiếc về điều không xảy ra trong quá khứ

exercises.q: It's high time you ___ (apologise) to her. She's been waiting for weeks.
exercises.exp: It's high time + past simple: nhấn mạnh sự cần thiết, đã quá muộn

exercises.q: I'd rather you ___ (not/mention) this to anyone until we're sure of the facts.
exercises.exp: Would rather + subject + past simple negative: muốn người khác không làm

exercises.q: If only she ___ (listen) to us — we told her exactly what would happen.
exercises.exp: If only + past perfect: hối tiếc mạnh về quá khứ

exercises.q: I wish he ___ (stop) interrupting people when they're speaking. It's so rude.
exercises.exp: Wish + would: phàn nàn về thói quen của người khác

exercises.q: ___ (suppose) you could start your career over — what would you do differently?
exercises.exp: Suppose/Supposing: đặt ra tình huống giả định

exercises.q: She'd rather her parents ___ (not/find out) about the situation at all.
exercises.exp: Would rather + subject + past simple: sở thích về hiện tại/tương lai

exercises.q: I wish he ___ (not/leave) without saying goodbye. It felt very abrupt.
exercises.exp: Wish + past perfect: hối tiếc về điều đã xảy ra trong quá khứ

exercises.q: It's time this system ___ (replace). It hasn't worked properly for years.
exercises.exp: It's time + past simple (passive): ngụ ý đã quá muộn, cần thay đổi ngay

exercises.q: I'd rather you ___ (not/share) that photo without asking me first.
exercises.exp: Would rather + subject + past perfect: muốn điều khác đã xảy ra trong quá khứ

exercises.q: If only the project team ___ (communicate) more openly — we could have caught the errors.
exercises.exp: If only + past perfect: hối tiếc về điều không xảy ra trong quá khứ

exercises.q: I wish people ___ (take) public transport more seriously — it would reduce congestion so much.
exercises.exp: Wish + would: mong muốn thay đổi hành vi (thói quen chung của mọi người)

exercises.q: She'd rather the decision ___ (make) by the whole team rather than just the director.
exercises.exp: Would rather + subject + past perfect (passive): muốn điều gì đó đã được làm khác đi

exercises.q: It's high time you ___ (face) up to your responsibilities instead of avoiding them.
exercises.exp: It's high time + past simple: nhấn mạnh đã quá muộn, cần hành động ngay

exercises.q: I wish I ___ (can/speak) more languages — travelling would be so much richer.
exercises.exp: Wish + could: ước muốn về khả năng hiện tại (không có thật)

exercises.q: If only he ___ (be) a bit more flexible — then we could have reached an agreement.
exercises.exp: If only + past perfect: hối tiếc về tính cách / hành vi trong quá khứ

exercises.q: I'd sooner ___ (work) from home permanently than commute for two hours every day.
exercises.exp: Would sooner + bare infinitive: sở thích mạnh về bản thân (không có subject sau)

exercises.q: I wish I ___ (be) more patient with people when I was younger.
exercises.exp: Wish + past perfect: hối tiếc về đặc điểm tính cách trong quá khứ

exercises.q: It's time we ___ (take) a completely different approach to this problem.
exercises.exp: It's time + past simple: đã đến lúc, ngụ ý cần thay đổi ngay

exercises.q: If only it ___ (stop) raining — we haven't seen the sun in a week!
exercises.exp: If only + would: phàn nàn về tình huống, mong muốn thay đổi

passage.text: Sarah sat alone in her apartment, staring at the acceptance letter she had declined three years ago. She {{1}} she had made a different decision. If {{2}} she had taken that postgraduate place in Edinburgh, her career might look very different now. {{3}} her mentor had not retired so suddenly, things might have gone differently. She {{4}} she could turn back time, but of course that was impossible. It was {{5}} she stopped blaming herself and focused on what came next. She {{6}} her friends would stop asking about her plans — the questions only made her feel worse. {{7}} she had been braver, she might be living her dream now. {{8}} she started the application again from scratch — was that realistic? She {{9}} there was still time, but deep down she {{10}} she had acted sooner.

The retired footballer reflected on his career during an interview. He said he {{1}} he had listened to his coach's advice more carefully in his twenties. {{2}} he not suffered that knee injury, things might have turned out completely differently. He {{3}} his teammates would stop dwelling on past defeats — it served no purpose. It was {{4}} for the younger players to realise how quickly a career can end. He {{5}} he had been given more opportunities at international level. {{6}} he could speak to his younger self, the advice would be simple: appreciate every moment. He {{7}} the media {{8}} so much pressure on young athletes — it was deeply damaging. The interviewer asked: {{9}} you could replay one match, which would it be? The footballer paused. {{10}} he had scored in that final — everything would have been different.

The head teacher addressed the school assembly with unusual honesty. She said it was {{1}} the students took their responsibilities to each other more seriously. She {{2}} bullying of any kind would stop — it had no place in their school. {{3}} the students had seen what she had seen in her thirty years of teaching, they would understand exactly why kindness mattered. She {{4}} more students would come forward when they witnessed unkind behaviour. It was {{5}} everyone understood that silence made things worse, not better. She {{6}} she had spoken more openly about these issues earlier in the year. {{7}} things been different, some situations might have been avoided entirely. She concluded by saying she {{8}} the students would remember this message. It was {{9}} for this community to change — and the change had to start with each person individually. {{10}} they each made one small effort tomorrow — imagine the difference it would make.

Daniel had always avoided confrontation, but the conversation could not be delayed any longer. He {{1}} he had addressed the problem months ago, before it escalated. {{2}} his colleague not spread those rumours, the whole situation could have been avoided. He {{3}} she would simply admit what she had done — that would make everything simpler. It was {{4}} for the management team to take a clear position on workplace conduct. He {{5}} the HR department had a stronger policy in place. {{6}} you were in his position — what would you do? He {{7}} he hadn't waited so long to speak up. His manager told him: it's {{8}} you made a formal complaint. Daniel knew she was right. {{9}} he had been more direct from the beginning, things {{10}} have reached this point.

The novelist gave a rare interview about her writing process and personal regrets. She said she {{1}} she had started writing fiction earlier in her life — she spent too many years in a career that never fulfilled her. {{2}} she had followed her instincts at twenty-five, she might already have written five novels by now. She {{3}} publishers would take more risks on debut authors — the industry was too cautious. It was {{4}} for the publishing world to embrace more diverse voices. {{5}} she could send one book to her younger self, it would be a journal — just to start writing. She {{6}} she hadn't wasted so many years worrying about what others thought. Her advice to aspiring writers was simple: it is {{7}} you began, regardless of your age. She {{8}} the reader would come away feeling that creativity was always worth pursuing — {{9}} it was frightening. {{10}} writing could change one thing in the world — that, she said, would be enough.

writing_prompts.vi: Hãy viết về một điều bạn ước giá như đã làm khác đi trong quá khứ — một quyết định, một cuộc trò chuyện, hay một cơ hội đã bỏ lỡ. Dùng wish, if only và would rather.
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: I wish + past perfect, if only + past perfect, I'd rather + past perfect, it's time, suppose
writing_prompts.example: Looking back, there is one decision I wish I had made differently. When I was nineteen, I had the chance to study abroad for a year, but I declined because I was afraid of being far from home. If only I had been braver at that age — I could have experienced so much more of the world. I wish things had turned out differently, but of course there is nothing I can do about it now. It's time I stopped dwelling on past choices and focused on creating new opportunities. I'd rather have taken that risk and struggled than stayed in my comfort zone and always wondered 'what if'. Suppose I could go back — I would pack my bags without hesitation. I wish I could tell my younger self that discomfort is not something to be feared, but something to be embraced. If only I had understood that at the time, my life might look very different today.

writing_prompts.vi: Bạn đang phàn nàn về những thói quen hoặc hành vi của những người xung quanh khiến bạn khó chịu. Dùng wish + would và if only + would để thể hiện sự bực bội.
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: I wish + would/wouldn't, if only + would, it's high time, I'd rather you
writing_prompts.example: Living in a shared flat has taught me a great deal about patience — more than I ever wanted to learn. I wish my flatmate would stop leaving dirty dishes in the sink for days on end. If only he would understand that we all share this space and need to respect each other's environment. I'd rather he didn't play loud music after midnight — some of us have early starts. I wish the neighbours would stop drilling at the weekend; it's been going on for months. If only people would think about how their behaviour affects those around them. It's high time someone in this building had a proper conversation about noise levels. I also wish the management company would respond to our complaints more promptly — we've been waiting for weeks. If only things would improve before the winter, because living like this is genuinely exhausting.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết về một người bạn ngưỡng mộ và những gì bạn ước mình có thể học hỏi từ họ. Dùng I wish, if only và it's time.
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: I wish I + past simple, if only I could, it's time I, I'd rather, suppose I
writing_prompts.example: My colleague Priya is one of the most composed and focused people I have ever met, and I often wish I were more like her. If only I could manage stressful situations with the same calm she seems to bring to every challenge. I wish I had her ability to listen without immediately jumping in with my own opinions. It's time I started practising patience in the way she does — she never seems rushed, even when deadlines are approaching. I'd rather be the kind of person who thinks before speaking, but it doesn't come naturally to me. Suppose I could spend just one week approaching things the way she does — I imagine the difference would be remarkable. I wish I could let go of small frustrations the way she does. If only I had started developing these habits earlier in my career, I might find things considerably less stressful by now.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết về một vấn đề xã hội hoặc môi trường và những gì bạn ước chính phủ hay cộng đồng sẽ làm. Dùng I wish, if only, it's high time và suppose.
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: I wish + would, if only + would/past perfect, it's high time + past simple, suppose, I'd rather
hint_words: I'd rather live in a world where
if only this had been addressed
writing_prompts.example: It is deeply frustrating to watch the environmental crisis unfold when so many solutions already exist. I wish governments would stop prioritising short-term economic gains over long-term sustainability. If only more people understood the urgency of what is happening to our oceans and forests, perhaps public pressure would force faster change. It's high time we stopped treating environmental protection as a political issue and started treating it as a basic moral responsibility. I'd rather live in a world where corporations were legally required to offset every ton of carbon they produced. Suppose every country had adopted stronger emissions targets twenty years ago — we would be in a very different position today. I wish the media would give this crisis the daily prominence it deserves instead of treating it as an occasional story. If only we had invested in renewable energy on a global scale a decade earlier, millions of people would already be benefiting from cleaner air and lower energy costs.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết một đoạn văn kể về một bữa tiệc, cuộc họp hoặc sự kiện không diễn ra như mong đợi — và những điều bạn ước đã khác đi. Dùng đa dạng các cấu trúc với wish, if only và would rather.
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: I wish + past perfect, if only + past perfect, I'd rather + past perfect, it's time, I wish + would
writing_prompts.example: Last Saturday's birthday dinner was not quite the success I had hoped for. I wish I hadn't chosen that restaurant — the service was painfully slow and the food arrived cold. If only I had read the reviews more carefully beforehand. I'd rather we had gone somewhere simpler; everyone would have been more relaxed. About halfway through the evening, an argument broke out between two guests over something entirely trivial, and I wished the ground would simply swallow me whole. If only someone had changed the subject more quickly — the tension ruined the mood for at least an hour. I wish I had made a seating plan rather than leaving people to choose randomly. By ten o'clock I could tell it was time to call the evening to a close, even though the occasion deserved something far better. I'd rather have spent the money on a small gathering at home. If only I had trusted my instincts from the very beginning.

upper.title: Unless, Even If, Provided, As Long As: Other Expressions in Conditionals
upper.content:
📌 Unless (= if not)
Unless = if ... not (trừ phi / nếu không):
• I won't go on holiday unless I save some money.
= I won't go on holiday if I don't save some money.
• She won't help you unless you ask her directly.

⚠️ KHÔNG dùng unless với ý nghĩa phủ định trong mệnh đề chính (unless đã mang nghĩa phủ định):
• ❌ Unless you study, you won't pass. = Unless you study, you will pass.
• ✅ You won't pass unless you study.
📌 In case
In case → Làm gì đó đề phòng điều có thể xảy ra:
• I'll take my umbrella in case it rains. (= because it might rain — mang ô đề phòng)
• Leave your number in case I need to contact you.

⚠️ So sánh với if:
• I'll take my umbrella if it rains. (Chỉ mang nếu trời mưa thật)
• I'll take my umbrella in case it rains. (Mang đề phòng, dù chưa mưa)
📌 As long as / Provided (that) / On condition (that) / Only if
Những cụm này nhấn mạnh điều kiện bắt buộc cần phải thỏa mãn:

As long as = miễn là / chỉ cần:
• I'll lend you the money as long as you pay me back by Friday.

Provided (that) / Providing (that) = với điều kiện là:
• You can borrow the car provided (that) you fill up the tank.

On condition (that) = với điều kiện (formal):
• They'll speak to the press on condition (that) they remain anonymous.

Only if = chỉ khi và chỉ khi (nhấn mạnh hơn if):
• I'll agree to this only if all parties sign the document.
⚠️ Only if ở đầu câu → đảo ngữ mệnh đề chính:
• Only if you pass the test will you receive the certificate.
📌 Whether or not / Even if / Suppose / Supposing
Whether or not = dù có hay không (cả hai tình huống đều xảy ra):
• I'll be there whether or not you invite me. (dù được mời hay không)

Even if = ngay cả khi (nhấn mạnh: dù tình huống không thuận lợi, kết quả vẫn thế):
• Even if you apologise, he'll never forgive you.
• She'll finish the race even if it takes all night.

Suppose / Supposing = hãy tưởng tượng rằng / giả sử:
• Suppose she doesn't believe you — what would you do?
• Supposing I lost my job — how would we manage?
I'll go whether or not it rains — I've been looking forward to this for weeks and nothing will stop me.Whether or not: cả hai tình huống đều dẫn đến cùng kết quả
You can attend the conference provided that you register before the deadline and pay the full fee in advance.Provided that: nhấn mạnh điều kiện bắt buộc

exercises.q: I'll tell you the truth ___ you promise not to tell anyone else.
exercises.opts: as long as,even if,unless,whether or not
exercises.exp: As long as = với điều kiện / chỉ cần (nhấn mạnh điều kiện cần thiết)

exercises.q: Don't leave without taking your passport ___ you need to prove your identity later.
exercises.exp: In case = đề phòng / vì có thể cần đến sau này

exercises.q: She'll finish the marathon ___ it takes all night. She never gives up.
exercises.exp: Even if = ngay cả khi (nhấn mạnh: dù mất bao lâu cũng vẫn làm)

exercises.q: ___ you have any questions, please feel free to ask at any point during the session.
exercises.exp: Should = If you have (inversion loại 1 — formal)

exercises.q: He won't sign the agreement ___ the legal team reviews every clause first.
exercises.exp: Unless = if not (trừ phi đội pháp lý xem xét trước)

exercises.q: I'll support your decision ___ you feel it is the right one for you.
exercises.exp: As long as = miễn là (điều kiện là bạn cảm thấy đúng)

exercises.q: ___ she disagrees with the plan, she will still implement it. That's her job.
exercises.exp: Even if = ngay cả khi không đồng ý, hành động vẫn xảy ra

exercises.q: Take a warm jacket ___ the temperature drops in the evening.
exercises.exp: In case = đề phòng / vì có thể trời lạnh vào buổi tối

exercises.q: They'll share the data with us ___ we agree to keep it confidential.
exercises.exp: Provided that = với điều kiện là (nhấn mạnh điều kiện cụ thể)

exercises.q: I'm going to tell him the truth ___ it upsets him. He deserves to know.
exercises.exp: Even if = dù có khó chịu đi nữa (nhấn mạnh quyết tâm)

exercises.q: ___ you were offered the position tomorrow — what would you say?
exercises.exp: Suppose = hãy tưởng tượng / giả sử (đặt ra tình huống giả định)

exercises.q: She'll attend the event ___ she receives an official invitation.
exercises.opts: only if,even if,as long as,in case
exercises.exp: Only if = chỉ khi và chỉ khi (điều kiện duy nhất)

exercises.q: He'll come to the party ___ you invite him. He'll come regardless.
exercises.opts: whether or not,even if,unless,as long as
exercises.exp: Whether or not = dù có mời hay không — kết quả vẫn như nhau

exercises.q: I'll help you ___ you had asked me earlier instead of doing it all yourself.
exercises.opts: I wish,even if,only if,as long as
exercises.exp: I wish + past perfect: hối tiếc về điều không xảy ra trong quá khứ

exercises.q: She agreed to cooperate ___ she was guaranteed anonymity throughout the process.
exercises.exp: On condition that = với điều kiện (trang trọng)

exercises.q: ___ you feel unwell during the exam, raise your hand and an invigilator will help you.
exercises.exp: If = loại 1: điều kiện đơn giản có thể xảy ra

exercises.q: You won't be admitted ___ you can show proof of registration at the entrance.
exercises.exp: Unless = if not: sẽ không được vào TRỪ PHI có thể chứng minh

exercises.q: Keep the receipt ___ you need to return the item or claim a warranty.
exercises.exp: In case = đề phòng phòng khi cần dùng đến sau này

exercises.q: ___ the meeting be cancelled at short notice, all participants will be notified by email.
exercises.exp: Should = If (inversion loại 1 formal): if the meeting is cancelled

exercises.q: He said he would continue ___ everyone else had given up on the project.
exercises.exp: Even if = ngay cả khi mọi người bỏ cuộc — anh ấy vẫn tiếp tục

exercises.q: I won't agree to the plan ___ (unless) every member of the team supports it fully.
exercises.exp: Unless = if not: tôi chỉ đồng ý nếu mọi người đều ủng hộ

exercises.q: Write down the contact details ___ (in case) you forget them later.
exercises.exp: In case = đề phòng khi cần — ghi lại vì có thể quên

exercises.q: She'll sign the contract ___ (on condition that) the salary is revised upward.
exercises.exp: On condition that = với điều kiện (trang trọng)

exercises.q: I'll support whatever you decide, ___ (whether or not) I personally agree with it.
exercises.exp: Whether or not = dù có đồng ý hay không — vẫn sẽ ủng hộ

exercises.q: ___ (only if) you return the equipment undamaged will the deposit be refunded.
exercises.exp: Only if đầu câu → đảo ngữ mệnh đề chính (will the deposit be refunded)

exercises.q: Take some cash with you ___ (in case) the card machine is not working.
exercises.exp: In case = mang tiền mặt đề phòng khi máy không hoạt động

exercises.q: ___ (suppose) you had to choose between career and family — which would you prioritise?
exercises.exp: Suppose/Supposing = hãy tưởng tượng tình huống giả định

exercises.q: We'll proceed with the launch ___ (unless) there is a last-minute technical failure.
exercises.exp: Unless = if not: chúng ta sẽ tiến hành trừ phi có sự cố kỹ thuật

exercises.q: ___ (even if) the journey takes twelve hours, I am determined to be there in person.
exercises.exp: Even if = ngay cả khi (nhấn mạnh: dù mất nhiều thời gian vẫn đi)

exercises.q: Keep your boarding pass handy ___ (in case) the gate agent asks to see it again.
exercises.exp: In case = đề phòng khi cần (nhân viên cổng có thể hỏi lại)

exercises.q: Discounts will be applied ___ (provided that) the coupon code is entered at checkout.
exercises.exp: Provided that = với điều kiện là (điều kiện bắt buộc để được giảm giá)

exercises.q: I will attend the launch event ___ (whether or not) my presentation is included in the programme.
exercises.exp: Whether or not = dù được trình bày hay không — vẫn sẽ tham dự

exercises.q: ___ (only if) the survey results show clear consensus will the policy be changed.
exercises.exp: Only if đầu câu → đảo ngữ: Only if... will the policy be changed

exercises.q: Save all your receipts ___ (in case) you need to claim expenses after the trip.
exercises.exp: In case = đề phòng cần hoàn tiền sau chuyến đi

exercises.q: ___ (suppose) no one shows up to the event — have you prepared a contingency plan?
exercises.exp: Suppose/Supposing = đặt ra tình huống giả định xấu nhất

exercises.q: The library card is valid ___ (as long as) it is renewed each academic year.
exercises.exp: As long as = miễn là (điều kiện duy trì hiệu lực của thẻ)

exercises.q: She agreed to give the interview ___ (on condition that) no photos were published with the article.
exercises.exp: On condition that = với điều kiện (trang trọng, điều kiện cụ thể người nói đặt ra)

exercises.q: The funding will be released ___ (as long as) all documentation is submitted on time.
exercises.exp: As long as = miễn là / chỉ cần (điều kiện để điều gì đó xảy ra)

exercises.q: He said he would finish the work ___ (even if) it meant working through the weekend.
exercises.exp: Even if = ngay cả khi phải làm việc suốt cuối tuần — vẫn xong

exercises.q: You are free to leave early ___ (provided that) you have completed the assigned tasks.
exercises.exp: Provided that = với điều kiện là (nhấn mạnh điều kiện bắt buộc)

passage.text: The new environmental policy was announced at a press conference this morning. The minister stated that the regulations would apply to all manufacturers {{1}} the size of their operation. Small businesses would be given an extended transition period, {{2}} they demonstrated genuine progress within the first twelve months. The policy would not be enforced {{3}} companies failed to submit an environmental impact report by the end of the year. Citizens were advised to keep records of their energy usage {{4}} they needed to apply for the proposed rebate scheme. The minister added that the plan would succeed {{5}} all sectors cooperated — {{6}} some found the new requirements inconvenient. A journalist asked: {{7}} your targets were missed in year one — what then? The minister replied that investment would continue {{8}} the data showed real progress. The reform would move forward {{9}} it faced opposition — {{10}} the opposition came from industry, government, or the public.

The mountaineering expedition set off at dawn. The team leader reminded everyone to pack emergency rations {{1}} the descent took longer than expected. She emphasised that the team would only attempt the summit {{2}} weather conditions remained safe — {{3}} anyone was unhappy with the conditions, the climb would be aborted immediately. She also stressed that the route would be completed {{4}} everyone moved at the same pace. Pack extra thermal layers, she said, {{5}} the temperature drops overnight. {{6}} the group to get separated, each member carried a personal GPS device. The journalist accompanying the team asked: {{7}} you reached the top in a blizzard — would you turn back? The leader replied: {{8}} the risk to life was minimal, yes, we'd press on. But {{9}} conditions deteriorated rapidly, we would descend immediately, {{10}} we were only metres from the summit.

The university published new guidelines for international applicants. Students may apply for a place {{1}} they meet the minimum academic requirements. Offers will be conditional, {{2}} applicants demonstrate adequate language proficiency before enrolment. Students are advised to apply for a visa early {{3}} processing times are longer than expected. The university will not proceed with an application {{4}} all required documents are submitted by the closing date. Financial support may be available, {{5}} students can demonstrate genuine need and maintain a satisfactory academic record. All offers will be withdrawn {{6}} students fail to register on the first day of term without notifying the admissions office. Students were also reminded to keep copies of all correspondence {{7}} disputes arose later. A prospective student asked at the open day: {{8}} I don't receive my results until after the deadline — what happens then? The admissions officer explained that extensions could be granted, {{9}} the delay was caused by circumstances beyond the student's control. {{10}} accepted, every student must agree to the university's code of conduct.

The theatre company announced its new season with an unusual set of conditions. Tickets would be offered at a reduced rate, {{1}} audience members agreed to participate in a short post-show discussion. The director explained that all shows would go ahead {{2}} the minimum audience threshold was met — {{3}} this meant performing to a small crowd, the cast was committed. Patrons were advised to arrive early {{4}} seating was reassigned due to late cancellations. The director added: {{5}} you removed all commercial pressure from theatre — what kind of stories might be told? Refunds would be issued {{6}} a performance was cancelled by the company itself. Volunteer ushers would be welcomed {{7}} they committed to at least four evenings per production. The company would tour regionally {{8}} it received the necessary Arts Council funding. The director concluded: we will make extraordinary theatre, {{9}} the budget is small — {{10}} audiences are willing to engage with us honestly.

The journalist was preparing to publish a sensitive investigative report. Her editor told her the story could be published {{1}} every fact was verified by at least two independent sources. The whistleblower had agreed to be interviewed {{2}} their name and location were never disclosed. The editor also recommended that the journalist save all her notes {{3}} legal challenges arose after publication. The story would run {{4}} the legal department gave full clearance. A colleague suggested: {{5}} the subject found out before publication — what was the plan? The journalist replied that she would proceed {{6}} any pressure was applied — {{7}} it came from inside the organisation or outside it. {{8}} the story not run this week, a rival outlet might break it first. The editor agreed, adding that the report would be published, {{9}} it caused controversy. {{10}} it was uncomfortable for some people, the public had a right to know.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết về một hợp đồng, thỏa thuận hoặc tình huống trong đó bạn đặt ra các điều kiện rõ ràng. Có thể là với bạn bè, đồng nghiệp, hoặc trong một bối cảnh trang trọng hơn. Dùng đa dạng các cụm thay thế cho if.
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Provided that, as long as, on condition that, only if, unless, even if, whether or not
hint_words: I will only agree provided that
writing_prompts.example: When my colleague asked me to co-manage the new project, I agreed — but only on certain conditions. I told him I would take on the role provided that we had a clear division of responsibilities from the start. As long as both of us communicated openly and flagged problems early, I felt confident we could succeed. I also made it clear that I would only commit to the extended timeline on condition that we were given access to the additional resources we had requested. Unless management approved the budget increase, I said, the deadlines they were proposing were simply unrealistic. I was willing to work flexibly — even if that meant occasional late evenings — whether or not I received extra compensation. My colleague agreed to everything, and we shook hands on it. As long as those conditions are respected throughout, I believe this will be one of the most rewarding projects I've been involved in.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết về một tình huống bạn chuẩn bị kỹ càng đề phòng những điều có thể xảy ra — chuyến đi, bài thi, hoặc sự kiện quan trọng. Tập trung vào in case và các cụm điều kiện khác.
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: In case, even if, as long as, unless, should (inversion), whether or not
hint_words: even if everything goes to plan
whether or not I feel ready
writing_prompts.example: Before any important exam or trip, I have a ritual of over-preparation that my friends find mildly amusing. Before my driving test last year, I printed out three copies of my confirmation letter in case the examiner needed extra documentation. I studied the theory questions every evening for a month, even if I already knew the answers, because repetition builds confidence. I brought a spare pen in case mine ran out mid-test, and I charged my phone fully in case I needed to call someone afterwards. As long as I had followed my preparation checklist, I knew I'd feel calmer on the day itself. Should any unexpected problem arise, I wanted to be ready rather than panicked. I also planned my route to the test centre the day before, whether or not I was familiar with the area, just to eliminate any last-minute stress. In the end, all that preparation meant I walked in feeling genuinely ready — and I passed first time.

writing_prompts.vi: Bạn đang thuyết phục ai đó tham gia một kế hoạch hoặc dự án có nhiều rủi ro. Giải thích rằng dù điều gì xảy ra, bạn vẫn cam kết. Dùng even if, whether or not, as long as và suppose/supposing.
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Even if, whether or not, as long as, suppose/supposing, only if, unless
hint_words: whether or not you join me
even if the odds are against
as long as we stay committed
writing_prompts.example: I know this idea sounds ambitious, but I want you to join me — whether or not you think it will succeed. I have thought about this carefully, and I am committed to moving forward even if the early stages are difficult. Suppose the first version completely fails — we would learn from it, adapt, and try again. That's how every worthwhile project begins. As long as we stay committed to the core idea and keep improving, I genuinely believe we can make something remarkable. Even if only a handful of people benefit from what we create, that will have been worth all the effort. I won't give up unless there is genuinely no path forward — and we're nowhere near that point. Whether or not we get external funding in the first year, we can start small and grow organically. Supposing things go wrong — and they might — we'll face each problem together. Only if we try will we ever know what's possible.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết một đoạn văn mô tả quy định hoặc chính sách của một tổ chức, cơ quan, hay nơi làm việc — sử dụng các cụm điều kiện để diễn đạt các quy tắc rõ ràng.
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Unless, provided that, on condition that, only if, as long as, in case, even if
writing_prompts.example: The company's remote working policy applies to all permanent staff, provided that their role does not require regular on-site presence. Employees may work from home up to three days per week, as long as they remain available during core hours and attend all scheduled meetings. Access to company systems from personal devices is permitted only if the device has been registered with the IT department and meets the required security standards. Staff must keep their line manager informed of their location at all times, unless they have an agreed fixed arrangement in place. In case of technical difficulties while working remotely, employees should contact the IT helpdesk immediately rather than attempting to fix the problem themselves. The policy may be reviewed or adjusted at any time, even if no formal complaints have been received. Employees who fail to comply with these guidelines will have their remote working privileges suspended, whether or not the breach was intentional.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết về một quyết định khó khăn liên quan đến việc duy trì hay chấm dứt mối quan hệ — bạn bè, công việc hay lãng mạn. Hãy nêu điều kiện và suy nghĩ của bạn.
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: As long as, unless, even if, whether or not, on condition that, suppose, only if
writing_prompts.example: Ending a long friendship is never easy, and I have been turning the situation over in my mind for months. I told myself I would stay committed to the friendship as long as things improved after our last honest conversation. But they haven't. I said I would give it one more chance, on condition that she made some effort to understand my perspective. Whether or not she intended to cause hurt, the pattern of behaviour has been consistent, and I cannot keep making excuses for it. Even if walking away feels like a failure, sometimes stepping back is the most self-respecting thing you can do. Suppose I decide to end contact entirely — would I regret it? Perhaps. But I know I would regret staying even more if nothing ever changed. I'll only reconsider unless I see a genuine shift in how she communicates. As long as I approach this with honesty and without bitterness, I believe I can move forward in a way I'm at peace with.
